sense.sense_summary: This sense refers to the process of acquiring knowledge or skills through experience, study, or instruction, emphasizing the active engagement in learning.
sense.contrastive_note: This sense is distinct from other senses of 'learn' that may imply merely being informed or memorizing facts without the deeper understanding or skill acquisition.
key_features: can occur through various methods (study, practice, instruction)
focuses on skill or knowledge acquisition

rationale.usvajati: odnosi se na proces sticanja znanja ili veština kroz iskustvo ili učenje.
rationale.naučiti: ukazuje na proces sticanja znanja ili veština, često kroz formalno obrazovanje.
rationale.savladati: naglašava postizanje veštine ili znanja kroz aktivno učenje i praksu.
rationale.proučavati: odnosi se na aktivno istraživanje i sticanje znanja o nekoj temi.
rationale.obučavati: ukazuje na proces sticanja veština kroz instrukciju ili vođstvo.
rationale.usvojiti: Ovaj glagol se koristi za opisivanje procesa sticanja znanja ili veština kroz aktivno angažovanje, što je u skladu sa osnovnim značenjem.

expanded_en.expanded_definition_en: To gain knowledge or skills through experience, study, or instruction, typically involving a process of understanding and retention. This action encompasses various methods of acquiring information, such as formal education, self-directed study, or practical engagement. It may also include the ability to assimilate new information and apply it effectively. The process of learning can occur at different stages and in various contexts, ranging from informal settings to structured academic environments.
notes_en: The definition emphasizes the process and context of learning.
It highlights the retention and application of knowledge as key aspects.

expanded_sr.expanded_definition_sr: Steći znanje ili veštine kroz iskustvo, učenje ili instrukciju, obično uz proces razumevanja i zadržavanja. Ova radnja obuhvata različite metode sticanja informacija, kao što su formalno obrazovanje, samostalno učenje ili praktično angažovanje. Takođe može uključivati sposobnost asimilacije novih informacija i njihove efikasne primene. Proces učenja može se odvijati u različitim fazama i u raznim kontekstima, od neformalnih okruženja do strukturiranih akademskih sredina.
notes_sr: Definicija naglašava proces i kontekst učenja.
Ističe zadržavanje i primenu znanja kao ključne aspekte.

candidates.register_note: Commonly used but can refer to acquiring in a broader sense beyond just knowledge.

candidates.register_note: Used in specific contexts, particularly in education and training.

            - Use hypernyms as genus constraints when available.
            - Use hyponyms to understand the lower boundary of the concept, not as direct synonyms.
            - Use meronyms and holonyms to capture part-whole structure when relevant.
            - Use sister synsets to avoid drifting into neighboring senses.
            - For every related synset, use its gloss/definition more than its lemma alone; relation lemmas can be ambiguous.

- Use dictionary lemma forms: infinitive for verbs, nominative singular for nouns.
- Prefer established Serbian lexical equivalents; do not invent calques or nonstandard spellings.
- Prefer natural Serbian lexicographic phrasing over word-for-word English gloss translation.
- Avoid English-like clause structure when Serbian has a shorter dictionary pattern.

- Respect Serbian prefix assimilation and morphology, e.g. avoid nonstandard forms like izpljunuti or izkašljati.
